text:
Market today: Mood is cautious-to-defensive. Investors are rotating OUT of tech into healthcare, and tariff threats on digital services are a direct headwind for the high-multiple tech names you live in. Chip/AI names are under pressure.

Your holdings: AVGO is your biggest problem — down nearly 16%, largest position, on margin. That amplified loss demands attention now. PLTR is down 13.7% and flagged SELL; two major losers at once on margin is dangerous. SPAL is down 17.4% — it's a 2x leveraged ETF that decays daily; every down-day costs you extra beyond the leverage.

Watch: (1) Whether the tech-to-healthcare rotation deepens — if it does, your whole book stays under pressure. (2) AVGO price action around your $336 stop — a break there on margin could force a cascade.

Bottom line: You have two leveraged losers (AVGO, SPAL) and a flagged SELL in PLTR all bleeding simultaneously on a margin account — that's where your full attention goes today.
